---
title: "About Me"
---

## [Bianca McAlister](https://www.linkedin.com/in/biancamcalister/)

##### BS Biology, BS ALIS; Georgia Institute of Technology

Hi, I’m Bianca McAlister, an MPH student at Morehouse School of Medicine. I am passionate about women’s health, cancer prevention, and advancing health equity in underserved communities. My work focuses on understanding how access to care shapes health outcomes and how we can reduce preventable disease through early detection and education.

### Current Studies:

MPH Candidate, Epidemiology Affinity Group

Morehouse School of Medicine

Expected Graduation, May 2026

> ### Key Interests:
>
> -   **Research Interests:** Women's Health, Chronic Disease, Cancer Prevention
>
> -   **Public Health Issues of Concern:** Access to care, Reducing chronic illness, Drug Epidemic in the United States
>
> -   **Population of Interest:** Women, Underserved Populations, Unhoused Populations

![](Headshot.jpg)
